name: bioCAPT
subtitle: Embodied intelligence from governed biological signal
thesis: Biological data remains governed when the body becomes part of the signal — not part of the product. bioCAPT learns from somatic context and lived experience without surrendering the person to extraction.
description: bioCAPT is the embodied-intelligence layer of the Inversion Labs ecosystem. It ingests biological and somatic signals (heart rate variability, motion, breath, peripheral state) and transforms them into a Cognitive State Graph (CSG) that CAPT can reason over. Intelligence here is temporal, relational, and embodied — not disembodied text prediction. A governed memory layer ensures that biological context is retained with explicit provenance and consent, so the body informs the system without becoming its inventory. bioCAPT is the substrate that lets CAPT act on state, not just language.
before: Intelligence begins and ends with language; the body is irrelevant or exploitable.
after: Cognition is embodied. The body is part of the signal — governed, not extracted.

architecture.principle: The body is a signal source under the person's governance, not a data mine.
pipeline: SENS — multi-channel biological signal ingestion (HRV, motion, breath, peripheral)
FILT — artifact filtering and signal estimation
PCFE — predictive coding of physiological surprise
CSG bridge — maps biosignal state into CAPT's Cognitive State Graph
ECHO — resonant memory of somatic episodes with provenance
HMC — hierarchical compression of biological context
VALUE_ALIGN — consent and governance gate before any state is used
core_outputs: biosignal-context — live physiological state available to CAPT
cognitive-state-graph — embodied node in the shared CSG
governed memory — biological episodes retained with explicit source and consent
architecture.distinction_from_disembodied_ai: Language models predict the next token from text. bioCAPT grounds reasoning in the body's actual state — arousal, recovery, regulation — so the system responds to a person's condition, not just their words.
architecture.governance: No biological signal is used without provenance and consent. VALUE_ALIGN gates state usage. Signals are processed local-first; extraction is an anti-pattern the architecture is built to prevent.

proof.exists: Research architecture + prototypes (biosignal → CSG bridge implemented)
proof.limit: Research stage; not a shipped product. Public repo URL is org-level; specific bioCAPT repository to be confirmed.

inv.human: See how your body's signals could inform a system that serves you — without becoming its product.
inv.builder: Sensory + state ingestion interfaces with consent-gated memory.
inv.researcher: Embodied cognition datasets, protocols, and the CSG bridge to CAPT.
